title: Wathe: Murder Mystery
description: A murder mystery social game (core mod for the Last Voyage of the Harpy Express experience)
body:
**⚠️⚠️⚠️ This is the core mod of the Last Voyage of the Harpy Express modpack / experience. This does not have the Harpy Express map or other mods this mod was designed to work in tandem with. If you wish to play this experience out of the box, [please download the mod pack instead](https://modrinth.com/modpack/harpy-express). ⚠️⚠️⚠️**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jOjo3WRIMe8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0Mee_7gmsmQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Making add-ons
If you wish to make an add-on for the mod, it offers a few API events and accessible things for you to do so. Maven link: https://maven.ladysnake.org/#/releases/dev/doctor4t/trainmurdermystery

#### Need a server? Use code RAT on Nodecraft for 30% off your first month!
https://nodecraft.com/r/rat
